description: Multi-chip MoE inference, Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct. Tests sparse expert routing efficiency across chip architectures. Minimum 2 chips required (model requires ~90GB BF16).
_required_chips_note: Suite G needs enough GPUs to fit Mixtral-8x7B (~90GB BF16). Set to 'auto' so runners use all available GPUs. Minimum 2×A100-80GB or 4×A100-40GB.
_concurrency_levels_note: Lower than Suite A due to larger model memory footprint per request.
_request_count_note: offline uses request_count (100), online uses online_request_count (300), interactive uses interactive_request_count (150)
